title: FCC Middleware Event Envelope
description: Canonical envelope for all domain events in the Forecourt Middleware Platform.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event instance (UUID v4).

schemaVersion.description: Payload schema version for this event type. Starts at 1.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp of when the domain event occurred.

correlationId.description: Links related events across the processing chain.

legalEntityId.description: Tenant scope — must reference an existing legal entity.

siteCode.description: Site identifier. Null only for legal-entity-scoped events (MasterDataSynced, ConfigChanged with scope legal_entity).

payload.description: Event-specific data. Schema determined by eventType + schemaVersion.
